title: Shine default spec fields
description: Shared spec constraints applied to every Datadog catalog entity type: lifecycle and tier. Note: area and domain live in extensions (not spec) because the upstream schema has additionalProperties: false on spec.

lifecycle.description: The maturity state of the entity (not the deployment environment).

tier.description: House criticality tier (1=highest). Use 'none' for experimental or unmaintained entities.
